_comment: WS-C2 T4 — golem-erp LLM-gateway upstream stub. Loaded at runtime into the in-cluster
WireMock via the admin protocol (Stage 2.1 InClusterWireMockLoader). Golem's PlanComposer
calls the LLM gateway (Prometheus) to compose a MiniPlan; Prometheus's Anthropic ChatModel
is base-url'd at this WireMock (ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL=http://wiremock:8080), so the Anthropic
Messages API POST /v1/messages lands here. The stubbed completion text is a RENDER-ONLY
MiniPlan (a single render node, NO query node): MiniPlanExecutor renders an empty TABLE
envelope and returns STATUS_DONE without touching the (fixture) query chain. That is the
agent-turn showcase — real query rows are the tpcds-query / real-data showcase, not this one.
GATED: GolemErpIntegrationSpec runs the answer-turn assertion only when answerTurnLive=true.
The exact Anthropic request-match + response envelope Spring AI 2.0.0-M2 parses may need one
live tweak on the first bp-dsk run (version-specific wire shape) — the 401/403 admission
assertions never reach the LLM and are green independent of this stub.

mappings._comment: Azure OpenAI chat-completions fallback — if the gateway routes the cheap tier to Azure rather than Anthropic, the same render-only MiniPlan rides the OpenAI response shape.
